toolbar.createOrderDenied: Only employees with orders.manage permission can create orders.

searchPlaceholder.orders: Search by order, client or device
searchPlaceholder.sales: Search by order, client or manager

filters.noSaved: No saved filters for this tab.
filters.saveFilterDenied: Employee profile is required to save filters.

payment.stockLocked: Refund client payment for bound products and return them to stock first.
payment.repairProductsNeedFullPayment: Repair orders with products can be issued after full payment.
payment.issuedRequiresPayment: Issued sale requires payment to cashbox unless total is 0.
payment.refundBeforeReturn: Refund must be completed via "Refund to client" before stock return.

errors.noManageSalesPermission: Current employee does not have permission to manage sales.
errors.noManageOrdersPermission: Current employee does not have permission to manage orders.
errors.employeeRequiredForFilters: Current employee is required to save filters.
errors.refundBeforeReturned: Refund client payment before marking sale as returned.
errors.shippedUnpaid: Product shipped but payment has not been received.
errors.noAcceptPaymentPermission: Current employee does not have permission to accept payments.
errors.noRefundPermission: Current employee does not have permission to refund payments.
errors.refundUnavailableStatuses: Refund is unavailable for "Issued", "Client rejected", and "Issued without repair" repair orders.
errors.noPaidForRefund: No paid amount is available for refund.
errors.onlyProductsToWarehouse: Only product items can be received back to warehouse.
errors.cannotReturnFromStatus: This product cannot be returned to stock from current status.
errors.bindSerialBeforeReturn: Bind shipped serial number before return to stock.
errors.refundBeforeLineReturn: Refund {{amount}} to client first, then return "{{name}}" to stock.
errors.noProductsToReturn: Sale has no products to return to stock.
errors.cannotReturnUnpaid: Cannot return a sale without received payment. Use another status for unpaid cancellation.
errors.refundBeforeRemoveLine: Refund the line item amount before removing it from the order.
errors.statusBlocksRemoval: This order status does not allow line item removal.
errors.oneSerialPerLine: Serialized products are sold one serial per line. Add another serial instead.
errors.paymentExceedsBalance: Payment amount cannot exceed the remaining balance.
errors.issuedRequiresPayment: Issued status requires payment to cashbox. Use payment action or keep unpaid status.
errors.refundExceedsPaid: Refund amount cannot exceed the paid amount.
errors.invalidReturnRefund: Refund amount is not valid for this return.
errors.fullPaymentBeforeIssue: Accept full payment before issuing attached products.
errors.failedSaveMainInfo: Failed to save order main information.
errors.returnProductsFirst: Return products to stock and refund client payment first.
errors.oneSerialPerLineAddSeparately: Serialized products are sold one serial per line. Add each serial separately.
errors.failedOpenSupplierModal: Failed to open supplier order modal.
errors.serviceNotFound: Service was not found in catalog.
errors.bindSerialBeforeReturnDetail: Bind sold serial number before stock return.
errors.useReturnFlow: Use Return flow for shipped serialized product.
errors.refundBeforeRemoveItem: Refund the line item amount before removing it.
errors.unbindSerialsFirst: Unbind serial numbers before removing this product.
errors.actionUnavailable: Action is unavailable for this item.
errors.editingBlocked: Editing is blocked for current order status.
errors.serialCountExceedsQty: Serial count cannot exceed line quantity.
errors.serialAlreadyLinked: Serial already linked to another order: {{serials}}.
errors.serialNotInStock: Serial was not found in stock: {{serials}}.

success.saleReturned: Sale returned, products moved back to stock, and refund completed.
success.supplierOrderCreated: Supplier order created with status New and added to Supplier Order tab.
